title: Pools
body:
Aspects of the systems seem to sometimes spread over time and connect to others like neural pathways.

Or perhaps like water splashed out of a pool filling the grooves in the concrete slowly connecting branches before evaporating in a hot summer sun.

I know these worlds are spawned unprompted from an artificial intelligence, but the haunting sensation one can experience in these spaces sometimes hint at an unearthly sentience at the wheel.
We never even got remotely this close at Gammon.

Dr. Senzaki
‎
